channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Keith Urban Names Inaugural Recipient of ‘Rising Star’ Scholarship
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our show, where we bring you the latest news from the world of music. Today, we're excited to share with you a story about a rising star in the country music scene. Keith Urban, the Australian-raised country music superstar, has identified his next big talent - Ethan Calway. Ethan is the inaugural recipient of the Keith Urban Rising Star Scholarship, a new initiative with the Tamworth Country Music Festival that aims to spotlight domestic country talent with international potential."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Ethan stood out from a strong field of contestants, and Keith Urban himself broke the news to him via a Zoom call. As the first recipient of the scholarship, Ethan will receive career-changing opportunities in Nashville, including the chance to perform, write, record, and connect with key industry figures at Urban's studio, The Sound."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Hailing from country Victoria, Ethan possesses electrifying guitar skills, a raw, emotive vocal style, and an authenticity that signals strong global potential. He's been compared to a young Keith Urban, and has already made a name for himself in the Australian music scene, with appearances on The Voice Australia and as a finalist in several talent searches."
[Short music transition]
Host: "To celebrate his scholarship win, Ethan has just dropped a new single, 'Better Tomorrow'. We caught up with him to talk about this incredible opportunity. 'I'm beyond grateful to be chosen for something like this,' he says. 'To learn, write and record in Nashville, and to have that kind of support behind me, is something I've always dreamed about.'"
[Short music transition]
Host: "The Tamworth Country Music Festival and Keith Urban's teams will be working closely with Ethan as he soaks up the scholarship experience. As Peter Ross, executive manager of the Tamworth Country Music Festival, puts it, 'The response to the scholarship has been extraordinary, and Ethan is a truly deserving recipient. This initiative reflects the shared values of the Festival and Keith - creating meaningful opportunities for artists to grow and reach new audiences.'"
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today's show. Congratulations to Ethan Calway on his well-deserved win, and we can't wait to see what the future holds for this talented young artist. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you next time."
